events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter George Michael, born in London on June 25, 1963, would have celebrated his 63rd birthday.

angles.name: Tribute to a legend
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music defined an era and continues to resonate.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: June 25, 2026 marks 17 years since the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, passed away in Los Angeles at the age of 50.

angles.name: King of Pop legacy
angles.copy: 17 years ago, the world lost a true icon. Michael Jackson's influence on music, dance, and culture remains unparalleled.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today, having been born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Sending a huge shout-out to the one and only Ringo Starr, who turns 86 today! Keep those drums rolling.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Brian May! From stadium anthems to astrophysics, what an absolute icon.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, born on July 26, 1943, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rocking! Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: The day music changed TV
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV hit our screens and changed music forever. Remember 'Video Killed The Radio Star'? Oh, the irony.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring hits like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years of 'Definitely Maybe'! Oasis' debut album still sounds as fresh and anthemic as it did in '94. What's your top track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley
events.blurb: August 16, 2026 marks 49 years since the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, died at his Graceland home at the age of 42.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: 49 years today, the world lost Elvis Presley. His music continues to inspire, electrify, and define generations. Long live the King.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur died on September 13, 1996, in Las Vegas, six days after being shot in a drive-by.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Voice
angles.copy: 30 years ago, we lost Tupac Shakur. His powerful lyrics and impact on hip-hop culture are still felt today.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix died in London on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: 56 years since the world said goodbye to Jimi Hendrix, a true pioneer who redefined the electric guitar. His music remains timeless.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years of 'Abbey Road'! The Beatles' eleventh studio album, with that unforgettable cover, dropped today in '69. Which track is your favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders' Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking and inspiring after all these years.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher, born on September 21, 1972, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Birthday Boy LG
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll attitude.

events.title: 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: A Song For Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A powerful message that still resonates today.

events.title: The first iPod was unveiled 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember the day your entire music collection fit in your pocket? 25 years ago, Apple unveiled the first iPod, changing how we listen forever.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Grab your martini, it's James Bond Day! Celebrating 007 and decades of iconic cinema. What's your favourite Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Music legend John Lennon, born on October 9, 1940, would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.
